headline: Xbox fans waiting on Project Helix get unexpected news from Wedbush
summary: The explosion in AI spending is having a ripple effect throughout the tech industry, and now gamers are going to pay the price. To find out just how much weight AI holds in the U.S. economy, the Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis looked at how much money is being spent on software, R&D and ...

headline: Meta At 17x P/E: Investing Doesn't Get Any Easier
summary: Meta Platforms remains under pressure due to investor skepticism over rising AI-driven capex and potential equity dilution. Learn why META stock is a buy.

headline: AMD Meta AI Chip Pact Puts Data Center Growth And Valuation In Focus
summary: AMD (NasdaqGS:AMD) has agreed its largest AI chip deal to date with Meta Platforms, tied to a multi-year 6-gigawatt Instinct GPU rollout. The agreement includes up to 160 million share warrants for Meta, linked to shipment milestones that could result in roughly 10% dilution for existing shareholders. AMD plans to ramp shipments of its MI450 AI accelerators in 2026, with deployments expected at Meta and OpenAI. For investors following AMD’s data center story, this deal puts AI accelerators...
